description: Frozen test cases for extractEntities() Tree-sitter parsing. Covers all 12 spec edge cases plus additional scenarios.

testCases.description: Arrow function export (const = arrow) — kind is 'variable' per spec, not 'function'
Declare statement (produces empty entities per spec)
Class with getter/setter (class entity + get_/set_ function entities)
Re-export with source (export { X } from './y' -- skipped per spec since it has source)
testCases.input:
export { UserService } from './services/user';
export { AuthHelper, TokenManager } from './auth';

testCases.description: Overloaded function (only implementation with body is extracted, overload signatures skipped)
Anonymous default export (should be skipped -- no name to extract)
Local re-export without source (export { foo, bar } -- produces kind 'export' entities)
